_provenance.source: GGG PoE2 game data via pathofexile-dat

skills.Name: Divine Flesh
skills.FlavourText: Give up your flesh unto the gods, and in vulnerability find strength.

skills.Name: Eternal Youth
skills.FlavourText: Burn the spirit to vitalise the flesh.

skills.Name: Immortal Ambition
skills.FlavourText: You may live forever, so long as someone remains to be sacrificed.

skills.Name: Corrupted Soul
skills.FlavourText: As true belief fades, the facade of faith grows, leaving you powerful but hollow.

skills.Name: Strength of Blood
skills.FlavourText: Wreathed in madness and blood, you are unstoppable.

skills.Name: Tempered by War
skills.FlavourText: Tasalio and Valako test you, child of the volcano. Prove yourself worthy.

skills.Name: Glancing Blows
skills.FlavourText: Utter trust in your defence unleashes ultimate potential.

skills.Name: Chainbreaker
skills.FlavourText: No man may enslave you, for you have a secret: you're always angry.

skills.Name: Wind Dancer
skills.FlavourText:
Invite the enemy when you are strong, evade them when you are weak;
strike with the coming of the storm.

skills.Name: The Traitor
skills.FlavourText: The fewer there are, the less you have to share.

skills.Name: Dance with Death
skills.FlavourText: You circle the black scorpion with enmity, daring it time and again.

skills.Name: Second Sight
skills.FlavourText: Speak not, but listen, for danger reveals itself on the wind.

skills.Name: The Agnostic
skills.FlavourText: Put your faith in intellect rather than mysticism.

skills.Name: Transcendence
skills.FlavourText: Master the mortal world, and you may find immortality beyond.

skills.Name: Inner Conviction
skills.FlavourText: Your every move is calm and calculated with absolute certainty.

skills.Name: Power of Purpose
skills.FlavourText: Empowered by the divine, you fear no weapon of man.

skills.Name: Supreme Decadence
skills.FlavourText: You may find that having is less pleasing a thing than wanting.

skills.Name: Supreme Grandstanding
skills.FlavourText: Your fiery passion inspires everyone around you - especially your foes.

skills.Name: Supreme Ego
skills.FlavourText:
You are the heart of the empire, shining bright so that all are lifted up by your light.
Let none tell you otherwise.

skills.Name: Supreme Ostentation
skills.FlavourText:
Displays of power are not just for show. If you are never truly tested,
you may divert those resources elsewhere.

skills.Name: Black Scythe Training
skills.FlavourText:
The most important lesson the company
taught was simple. Be clever, and survive.

skills.Name: Circular Teachings
skills.FlavourText:
It is both despair and inspiration, to look back,
and see oneself in the cycles of Time.

skills.Name: Knightly Tenets
skills.FlavourText:
Many men throughout history have claimed to
stand against evil. Only a few truly meant it.

skills.Name: Sacrifice of Flesh
skills.FlavourText: I pledge my soul to you, Liege of the Lightless, and vow to conquer nations in your name!

skills.Name: Sacrifice of Loyalty
skills.FlavourText: I pledge my soul to you, Lord of Liches, and vow to end the scourge of Life itself!

skills.Name: Sacrifice of Mind
skills.FlavourText: I pledge my soul to you, the Blackblooded, and vow to usurp the power of Darkness!

skills.Name: Sacrifice of Blood
skills.FlavourText: I pledge my soul to you, Hated Slave, and vow to exact revenge upon your kind!

skills.Name: Sacrifice of Sight
skills.FlavourText: I pledge my soul to you, Sovereign of the Well, and vow to bring eternal night!
